column1: https://openreview.net/forum?id=4XKKUifQ9c	ClutterDexGrasp: A Sim-to-Real System for General Dexterous Grasping in Cluttered Scenes	Zeyuan Chen;Qiyang Yan;Yuanpei Chen;Tianhao Wu;Jiyao Zhang;Zihan Ding;Jinzhou Li;Yaodong Yang;Hao Dong	Cluttered Scene;Dexterous Grasping;Sim-to-Real		CoRL 2025 Oral	https://openreview.net/pdf/03293ba8eefdc68dc5f9cc65fb7ddb23b36d8a0a.pdf	https://openreview.net/attachment/a2a8303da3ce60838859bf4d3d853a66c93fb6b6.zip			Dexterous grasping in cluttered scenes presents significant challenges due to diverse object geometries

column6: making them costly and difficult to scale. To address these limitations
column7: we revisit the sim-to-real transfer pipeline and develop key techniques that enable zero-shot deployment in reality while maintaining robust generalization. We propose ClutterDexGrasp

column10: enabling general

column12: and safe grasping behaviors. Through imitation learning

column15: demonstrating robust performance across diverse objects and layouts.

column1: https://openreview.net/forum?id=0ViTEgiFiQ	Disentangled Multi-Context Meta-Learning: Unlocking Robust and Generalized Task Learning	Seonsoo Kim;Jun-Gill Kang;Taehong Kim;Seongil Hong	Meta-Learning;Multi Task Learning;Quadruped Robot Locomotion		CoRL 2025 Poster	https://openreview.net/pdf/21a4cdd91c37f123616e5eb48a831f932bbc3aff.pdf	https://openreview.net/attachment/b8e495e152630f720a5029e348952e578f251e8f.zip	Explicit and selective context modeling enables robust and generalizable robot learning	https://openreview.net/attachment/301b63c48d5afddca8074d6ae5bf9d4ef0e4ca98.mp4	In meta-learning and its downstream tasks

column2: achieving an average task success rate of 86\%.
